posts.title: Stick
posts.body:
default weapon

Stats
Deals: 5 dmg
Every level gets +1 dmg

posts.title: Dagger
posts.body:
Sharp tool

Stats
Deals: 10 dmg
Every level gets +2 dmg

Obtainment
buy in starter shop for 100 gold

posts.title: Super Stick
posts.body:
Cool weapon. Can do multiple dmg

Stats
Rarity : Legendary
Deals: 20 dmg
Every level gets +2 dmg

Obtainment
5% from Dummy

posts.title: Secret Stick
posts.body:
Really good weapon. Does random damage upon hit (1-999)

Stats
Rarity : Secret
Deals: ??? dmg
Every level gets +5 dmg

Obtainment
0.0001% from Dummy

posts.title: Dummy Blade
posts.body:
Really good weapon. On 5th slash releases dummy head that deals 1000dmg

Stats
Rarity : Secret
Deals: 750 dmg
Every level gets +5 dmg + increases by 10 every level

Obtainment
Compleate Happy Block questline
(To see quest check in quest Long path of pain)

posts.title: Evil casual battle
posts.body:
Simple quest that requires to beat Dummy Swarm 7 times
Rewards:
1000 gold
250 exp

posts.title: Long path of pain
posts.body:
Maybe the longest questline
(You need at least 50 LV to get questline)

First step:
Beat Dummy 100 times
Rewards: 1 gold

Second step:
Give Happy Block 250K gold
Rewards: 1 gold

Third step:
Beat King Dummy 50 times
Rewards: 1 gold

Fourth step:
Beat Dummy Swarm 299 times
Rewards: 1 gold
(Hardest step imo)

Last strech:
Give him 1.25M gold
Rewards: Dummy Blade
